info.title: 876 Billing API
info.description: Tenant-scoped commercial billing resources and the server-only projection surface used by 876 Console.

tags.name: Organization integrations
tags.description: Official organization-scoped interface for trusted 876 services and delegated third-party applications.

patch.summary: Replace a received payment and its allocations

delete.summary: Delete and reverse a received payment

post.summary: Apply unapplied payment cash to invoices

get.summary: Retrieve customer account totals and statement

post.summary: Record a dated customer opening balance
Finalize an invoice and post its receivable
Assess eligible overdue invoices using the current late-fee policy
Idempotently invoice a due subscription period

delete.summary: Soft-delete a subscription while retaining financial history

post.summary: Pause a subscription now or on a future date
Cancel a subscription now, at renewal, or on a future date
Reactivate a cancellation or create a successor subscription
Apply or schedule a subscription composition and terms change

get.summary: List one-time charges for a subscription
List discounts applied to a subscription

post.summary: Apply a coupon or manual subscription discount

get.summary: Retrieve subscription defaults and automation settings

patch.summary: Update subscription defaults and automation settings

post.summary: Preview a mid-period subscription item change
Clone a plan with fresh prices and tiers

patch.summary: Update price metadata or lifecycle state

post.summary: Clone an add-on with fresh prices and plan availability

put.summary: Create or update add-on availability for a plan

post.summary: Create a percentage or custom price list
Resolve a catalog price through a price list

get.summary: Retrieve a coupon and its applicability

post.summary: Run a bounded provider-independent billing sweep

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required for product app and delegated OAuth creates; stable across retries.

post.summary: Create a shared finance catalog item

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required for product app and delegated OAuth creates; stable across retries.

get.summary: Retrieve a shared finance catalog item

patch.summary: Update a shared finance catalog item

delete.summary: Archive a shared finance catalog item

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required for product app and delegated OAuth creates; stable across retries.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required for product app and delegated OAuth creates; stable across retries.

Session.name: 876-session
Session.description: Sealed 876 session for an active Billing workspace.

appApiKey.name: x-876-api-key
appApiKey.description: A server-only 876 product app key with an active finance connection.

delegatedOAuth.description: A short-lived 876 access token. The subject must also be an active member of the target organization.

scopes.billing.organizations.read: Read Billing workspace details for an organization.
scopes.billing.customers.read: Read Billing customers for an organization.
scopes.billing.customers.write: Create, update, and archive Billing customers for an organization.
scopes.billing.items.read: Read shared finance catalog items for an organization.
scopes.billing.items.write: Create, update, and archive shared finance catalog items for an organization.
scopes.billing.plans.read: Read Billing plans for an organization.
scopes.billing.subscriptions.read: Read Billing subscriptions for an organization.
scopes.billing.subscriptions.write: Manage Billing subscriptions for an organization.
scopes.billing.invoices.read: Read shared finance invoices for an organization.
scopes.billing.invoices.write: Create and manage shared finance invoices for an organization.
scopes.billing.payments.read: Read shared finance payments for an organization.
scopes.billing.payments.write: Record shared finance payments for an organization.
